_doc: Project-specific coverage gate config. Read by .codex/precommit_hooks/probe_coverage.py. Adjust feature_globs to match your stack's feature directories; exempt_globs to opt out infra/tests/3rd-party. Starter template is stack-generic — DO NOT hard-code module names here (violates module-agnostic-skill-rules invariant).
_note: Set to {} (empty) to use built-in defaults from probe_coverage.py.
